t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    max_a_idx = a.index(max(a))
    max_b_idx = b.index(max(b))
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        if i == max_a_idx or i == max_b_idx or b[i] > b[max_a_idx] or a[i] > a[max_b_idx]:
            res.append('1')
        else:
            res.append('0')
    print(''.join(res))

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    max_a = max(a)
    max_b = max(b)
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        if a[i] == max_a or b[i] == max_b or a[i] > max_a or b[i] > max_b:
            res.append('1')
        else:
            ma_idx = a.index(max_a)
            mb_idx = b.index(max_b)
            can_beat_maxa = a[i] > a[ma_idx] or b[i] > b[ma_idx]
            can_beat_maxb = a[i] > a[mb_idx] or b[i] > b[mb_idx]
            if can_beat_maxa or can_beat_maxb:
                res.append('1')
            else:
                res.append('0')
    print(''.join(res))

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        can_win = True
        for j in range(n):
            if i == j: continue
            # does j dominate i?
            if a[j] > a[i] and b[j] > b[i]:
                # need some k that beats j and i beats k
                found = False
                for k in range(n):
                    if k == i or k == j: continue
                    if (a[k] > a[j] or b[k] > b[j]) and (a[i] > a[k] or b[i] > b[k]):
                        found = True
                        break
                if not found:
                    can_win = False
                    break
        res.append('1' if can_win else '0')
    print(''.join(res))

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        dominators = [(a[j], b[j], j) for j in range(n) if a[j] > a[i] and b[j] > b[i]]
        if not dominators:
            res.append('1')
            continue
        can_win = True
        for (aq, bq, q) in dominators:
            # Need some R that P can beat and R can beat Q
            found = False
            for j in range(n):
                if j == i or j == q: continue
                if (a[i] > a[j] or b[i] > b[j]) and (a[j] > aq or b[j] > bq):
                    found = True
                    break
            if not found:
                can_win = False
                break
        res.append('1' if can_win else '0')
    print(''.join(res))

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t): solve()

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        dominators = [(a[j], b[j], j) for j in range(n) if a[j] > a[i] and b[j] > b[i]]
        if not dominators:
            res.append('1')
            continue
        can_win = True
        for (aq, bq, q) in dominators:
            # Need some R that P can beat and R can beat Q
            found = False
            for j in range(n):
                if j == i or j == q: continue
                if (a[i] > a[j] or b[i] > b[j]) and (a[j] > aq or b[j] > bq):
                    found = True
                    break
            if not found:
                can_win = False
                break
        res.append('1' if can_win else '0')
    print(''.join(res))

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t): solve()
